seo.title: APS Planner — Finch-AI | Advanced Planning System for Manufacturing
seo.description: Finch-AI's APS (Advanced Planning System): advanced manufacturing production planning with multi-algorithm optimization and a natural-language conversational interface.
seo.keywords: APS, advanced planning system, production planning software, production scheduling, MES, manufacturing optimization, AI for manufacturing, Finch-AI
seo.ldDescription: Finch-AI's APS is the manufacturing production planner: multi-algorithm scheduling optimization and a natural-language conversational interface.

hero.lead: An advanced planning system for manufacturing production: multi-algorithm optimization and a natural-language conversational interface to manage scheduling without the complexity.

features.title: Advanced scheduling optimization
features.desc: Heuristic, metaheuristic and exact algorithms generate optimal production plans, balancing constraints, resources and priorities.

features.title: Natural-language conversational interface
features.desc: Interact with the planner like a production expert: ask, simulate and re-plan in natural language.

features.title: End-to-end multi-constraint scheduling
features.desc: Orders, machines, shifts and materials in a single, consistent planning engine, always up to date.

featRows: Integrates with existing ERP and MES

valueHead.title:
From theory to the shop floor,
fast.
valueHead.lead: APS brings mathematical optimization into daily planning, with an interface anyone in production can use.

cta.title:
Ready to plan
with AI?
cta.text: We'll show you APS on your real orders and constraints in a 30-minute demo, no commitment.
